item.title: Galaxy S23 Ultra
item.shortDescription: A big-screen Android phone with an excellent camera system, built-in S Pen, and enough battery to feel dependable all day.
item.description: A flagship Android phone recommendation for capture, notes, and everyday mobile work.
item.verdict: A phone that behaves more like a pocket workstation.
item.whyItStayed: The big screen, strong cameras, and S Pen make it useful for capturing, annotating, and doing real work away from the desk.
item.howIUseIt: Photos, quick notes, reading, navigation, travel planning, and mobile admin when opening a laptop would be overkill.
item.replaced: A smaller phone that made mobile work feel cramped.
item.summary: A big-screen Android phone with an excellent camera system, built-in S Pen, and enough battery to feel dependable all day.
